title: The Shawshank Redemption
plot: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency. Andy Dufresne, wrongly convicted of murder, survives decades of abuse and injustice in Shawshank prison.

title: The Dark Knight
plot: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice. The film explores the thin line between order and anarchy.

title: Inception
plot: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O. The deeper he goes into the dream layers, the more reality blurs.

title: Interstellar
plot: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival. With Earth's resources depleted, a former NASA pilot leads a desperate mission across the galaxy seeking a new habitable world.

title: The Godfather
plot: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son. A saga of family loyalty, honor, and betrayal that redefined American cinema.

title: Pulp Fiction
plot: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption. Tarantino's nonlinear storytelling became a landmark of modern cinema.

title: Forrest Gump
plot: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and the civil rights movement unfold through the perspective of an Alabama man with an extraordinary life. A simple man touches the lives of everyone he meets.

title: The Matrix
plot: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers. The film introduced groundbreaking bullet-time visual effects and philosophical themes.

title: Good Will Hunting
plot: Will Hunting, a janitor at MIT, has a gift for mathematics but needs help from a therapist to find direction. A story about genius, trauma, and the courage to embrace one's potential.

title: Spirited Away
plot: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts. She must work to find a way to free herself and her parents.

title: Parasite
plot: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan. Bong Joon-ho's Oscar-winning film dissects South Korean class tensions with darkly comic precision.

title: Get Out
plot: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, where his mere presence seems to prompt an unexpected response. Jordan Peele's debut blends social satire with visceral horror to devastating effect.

title: La La Land
plot: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations for the future. A gorgeous love letter to dreamers and Hollywood's golden age.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
plot: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search of her homeland with the help of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max. A relentless two-hour car chase masterpiece.

title: Her
plot: A lonely writer develops an unlikely relationship with an operating system designed to meet his every need. The film is a tender meditation on connection, loneliness, and what it means to be human in the digital age.

title: The Social Network
plot: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claimed he stole their idea, and by the co-founder who was later ousted from the company.

title: Whiplash
plot: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are challenged by an abusive instructor. The film explores the psychological cost of artistic perfectionism.

title: 3 Idiots
plot: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion. They revisit their college days and uncover a long forgotten bet. A hilarious yet deeply touching critique of India's pressure-cooker education system.

title: Dangal
plot: Former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat trains his daughters Geeta and Babita to become world-class wrestlers against the backdrop of a conservative society. Based on the true story of India's first female Commonwealth wrestling champions.

title: PK
plot: An alien on a research mission to Earth loses his remote control and must rely on a television reporter to help him find it. Along the way he questions the blind faith and organised religion that divide humanity.

title: Schindler's List
plot: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis. One of cinema's most powerful accounts of the Holocaust.

title: The Avengers
plot: Nick Fury of S.H.I.E.L.D. brings together a team of superheroes to pull the world back from the brink of disaster when Loki, the god of mischief, makes a play for world domination. The film redefined the blockbuster ensemble.

title: Avengers: Endgame
plot: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos's actions and restore order to the universe. An emotional payoff to over a decade of Marvel storytelling.

title: The Lion King
plot: A lion prince is exiled after his father is murdered by his uncle, and must reclaim his homeland. A timeless Disney tale of responsibility, guilt, and the circle of life.

title: Gladiator
plot: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery. Ridley Scott's epic restored the sword-and-sandal genre for a new generation.

title: Braveheart
plot: Scottish warrior William Wallace leads his countrymen in a rebellion to free his homeland from the tyranny of King Edward I of England. Mel Gibson's sweeping historical epic won five Academy Awards.

title: Titanic
plot: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic. James Cameron's epic remains one of the highest-grossing films of all time.

title: Avatar
plot: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home. A revolutionary visual spectacle.

title: Gravity
plot: A medical engineer and an astronaut work together to survive after a catastrophe destroys their shuttle and leaves them adrift in orbit. Cuarón's technically breathtaking film is a masterclass in sustained tension.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
plot: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer. Anthony Hopkins' portrayal of Hannibal Lecter became one of cinema's most iconic villains.

title: Fight Club
plot: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soapmaker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more. David Fincher's anarchic classic remains a touchstone of 1990s cinema.

title: American Beauty
plot: A sexually frustrated suburban father has a mid-life crisis after becoming infatuated with his daughter's best friend. Sam Mendes' film is a darkly comic dissection of American suburban life.

title: No Country for Old Men
plot: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande. The Coen Brothers' bleak masterpiece ponders fate and the nature of evil.

title: There Will Be Blood
plot: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil, and madness, focusing on a turn-of-the-century prospector in the early days of the oil business. Daniel Day-Lewis delivers one of cinema's most ferocious performances.

title: Rocky
plot: A small-time boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight the world heavyweight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect. The original underdog sports story that inspired generations.

title: The Truman Show
plot: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show. Jim Carrey delivers a surprisingly moving performance as a man who has never known a world outside the one constructed for him.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
plot: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories. A beautifully fractured love story about the pain and necessity of remembering.

title: 28 Days Later
plot: Four weeks after a mysterious, incurable virus spreads throughout the UK, a handful of survivors try to find sanctuary. Danny Boyle's low-budget horror reinvented the zombie genre for a new generation.

title: Children of Men
plot: In 2027, in a chaotic world in which women have somehow become infertile, a former activist agrees to help transport a miraculously pregnant woman to a sanctuary at sea. One of the most viscerally immersive sci-fi films ever made.

title: Oldboy
plot: After being inexplicably imprisoned for 15 years, a man is released and given five days to find his captor. Park Chan-wook's revenge thriller builds to one of cinema's most shocking twists.

title: Memento
plot: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer using a system of tattoos and polaroid photographs. Christopher Nolan's debut masterpiece plays with time and identity in dazzling fashion.

title: Requiem for a Dream
plot: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island people are shattered when their addictions run deep. Darren Aronofsky's harrowing portrait of addiction remains one of cinema's most difficult and essential films.

title: A Beautiful Mind
plot: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish. Russell Crowe's performance anchors this moving portrait of genius and mental illness.

title: Rain Man
plot: Selfish yuppie Charlie Babbitt's father left a fortune to his savant brother Raymond and a pittance to Charlie; Charlie hates Raymond and wants to either get the money or get even. A touching portrait of brotherly love.

title: Die Hard
plot: An NYPD officer tries to save his wife and several others taken hostage by German terrorist Hans Gruber during a Christmas party at the Nakatomi Plaza in Los Angeles. The definitive action movie template.

title: Aliens
plot: Fifty-seven years after surviving an apocalyptic attack aboard her space vessel by merciless space creatures, Officer Ripley awakens from hypersleep and is beckoned to return to the alien home world. James Cameron's sequel elevated the original.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
plot: A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her teen aged son John from a more advanced and powerful cyborg. Revolutionary visual effects combined with genuine emotional depth.

title: The Wrestler
plot: A faded professional wrestler must retire, but finds his quest for a new life outside the ring a dispiriting struggle. Mickey Rourke's raw comeback performance is the beating heart of this intimate character study.

title: Black Swan
plot: A committed dancer wins the lead role in a production of Tchaikovsky's Swan Lake only to find herself struggling to maintain her sanity. Natalie Portman's Oscar-winning performance is a tour de force.

title: The Prestige
plot: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other. Christopher Nolan's puzzle-box thriller rewards repeated viewings.

title: Catch Me If You Can
plot: Frank Abagnale Jr., a brilliant young con man, successfully passes himself off as a Pan American World Airways pilot, a Georgia doctor, and a Louisiana parish prosecutor before his 21st birthday. Based on a remarkable true story.

title: The Departed
plot: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while simultaneously infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston. Scorsese's Oscar-winning crime saga is a masterclass in sustained tension.

title: Goodfellas
plot: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his recollections of an Italian-American mob life from the 1950s through 1980s. Scorsese's kinetic masterpiece remains the gold standard of gangster cinema.

title: Casino
plot: A tale of greed, deception, money, power, and murder occur between two best friends: a mafia enforcer and a casino executive compete against each other over a gambling empire, and over a fast-living socialite.

title: Shutter Island
plot: In 1954, a U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane on a remote island. Scorsese builds an atmosphere of escalating paranoia toward a stunning revelation.

title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
plot: In the post-apocalyptic Australian wasteland, a cynical drifter agrees to help a small community escape a band of bandits. George Miller's sequel perfected the post-apocalyptic template that spawned countless imitators.

title: The Road
plot: A father and his son walk alone through burned America after a cataclysm that has destroyed most of civilization and most life on earth. A bleak yet tender meditation on parental love in the darkest of circumstances.

title: Apocalypse Now
plot: A special ops officer is sent to terminate a renegade Army Special Forces Colonel in the jungles of Vietnam. Coppola's Vietnam War epic is one of cinema's most ambitious and hallucinatory achievements.

title: Full Metal Jacket
plot: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects that the Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue. Kubrick's bifurcated masterpiece.

title: Platoon
plot: A young soldier in Vietnam faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man. Oliver Stone's autobiographical film remains the definitive ground-level Vietnam War story.

title: Saving Private Ryan
plot: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose three brothers have been killed in action. Spielberg's D-Day sequence remains the most realistic combat ever filmed.

title: Chariots of Fire
plot: Two British athletes compete for glory at the 1924 Paris Olympics: Eric Liddell, a devout Scottish Christian, and Harold Abrahams, an English Jew. A poignant exploration of faith, identity, and ambition.

title: The Theory of Everything
plot: A look at the relationship between the famous physicist Stephen Hawking and his wife. Eddie Redmayne won the Academy Award for Best Actor for his transformation into the legendary scientist.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
plot: The story of the legendary British rock band Queen and lead singer Freddie Mercury, leading up to their famous performance at the Live Aid concert. A crowd-pleasing tribute to one of rock's greatest showmen.

title: The Pianist
plot: A Polish Jewish musician struggles to survive the destruction of the Warsaw ghetto of World War II. Adrien Brody's performance is a masterpiece of restraint in Roman Polanski's deeply personal film.

title: 12 Years a Slave
plot: In the antebellum United States, Solomon Northup, a free black man from upstate New York, is abducted and sold into slavery. Steve McQueen's unsparing film is one of the most important in the history of American cinema.

title: The Imitation Game
plot: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Bletchley Park. Benedict Cumberbatch is exceptional.

title: Spotlight
plot: The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation and cover-up within the local Catholic Archdiocese, shaking the entire Catholic Church to its core. A precise and devastating film.

title: 12 Angry Men
plot: A jury holdout attempts to prevent a miscarriage of justice by forcing his colleagues to reconsider the evidence in a murder trial. Henry Fonda anchors one of cinema's greatest chamber dramas about the justice system.

title: Roman Holiday
plot: A young princess, tired of her royal duties, flees her handlers and meets a charming American newsman in Rome. Audrey Hepburn's debut performance is one of the most enchanting in Hollywood history.

title: Casablanca
plot: A cynical American expatriate encounters a former lover, now the wife of a Czech resistance leader, in Casablanca during World War II. Perhaps Hollywood's most perfectly constructed romantic drama.

title: Singin' in the Rain
plot: A silent film production company and cast make a difficult transition to sound films. Gene Kelly's iconic rain-soaked dance sequence is cinema's most joyful moment.

title: The Wizard of Oz
plot: Dorothy Gale is swept away from a farm in Kansas to a magical land of Oz in a tornado and embarks on a quest with her new friends to see the Wizard who can help her return home. A cornerstone of American fantasy cinema.

title: Some Like It Hot
plot: When two musicians witness a mob hit, they flee the state in an all-female band disguised as women, but further complications set in. Billy Wilder's comedy is frequently cited as the greatest comedy film ever made.

title: Annie Hall
plot: Neurotic New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditzy Annie Hall. Woody Allen's Oscar-winning film redefined the romantic comedy genre with its self-referential wit.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
plot: A writer encounters the owner of an aging European hotel as a young man, and he tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy in the hotel's glorious years under an exceptional concierge. Wes Anderson at his most inventive.

title: Moonrise Kingdom
plot: A pair of young lovers flee their New England town, which causes a local search party to fan out to find them. Wes Anderson's most purely romantic film, filled with warmth and melancholy in equal measure.

title: The Martian
plot: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assume him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal to Earth that he is alive. Ridley Scott delivers his most optimistic and crowd-pleasing film.

title: Arrival
plot: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world. Denis Villeneuve's cerebral sci-fi is built on a devastating emotional twist.

title: Zootopia
plot: In a city of anthropomorphic animals, a rookie bunny cop and a cynical con artist fox must work together to uncover a conspiracy. A sophisticated animated film with genuine things to say about prejudice and identity.

title: Inside Out
plot: After young Riley is uprooted from her Midwest life and moved to San Francisco, her emotions — Joy, Fear, Anger, Disgust and Sadness — conflict on how best to navigate a new city, house, and school. Pixar's most emotionally intelligent film.

title: Up
plot: By tying thousands of balloons to his home, 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen sets out to fulfill his lifelong dream to see the wilds of South America and keep a promise made to his late wife. Opens with one of cinema's most affecting montages.

title: WALL-E
plot: In the distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind. A nearly wordless opening act that is pure cinema at its most expressive.

title: Finding Nemo
plot: After his son is taken by a diver, an anxious clownfish sets out on a journey across the ocean to find him, helped along the way by a friendly but forgetful fish named Dory. A love letter to the ocean and parental devotion.

title: The Notebook
plot: A poor yet passionate young man falls in love with a rich young woman, giving her a sense of freedom, but they are soon separated because of their social differences. A quintessential weepy romance that launched Ryan Gosling's career.

title: Pride and Prejudice
plot: Sparks fly when spirited Elizabeth Bennet meets single, rich, and proud Mr. Darcy. Joe Wright's adaptation of Austen's classic novel remains the definitive version for a new generation of viewers.

title: Sense and Sensibility
plot: Rich in romance and wit, this adaptation of Jane Austen's novel tells the story of the Dashwood sisters, the reserved Elinor and the passionate Marianne. Emma Thompson won the Oscar for her screenplay.

title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
plot: Based on the true story of a real-life friendship between Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod. Tom Hanks' gentle portrayal of Mr. Rogers is a tender meditation on kindness and healing childhood wounds.

title: Soul
plot: A musician who has lost his passion for music is transported out of his body and must find his way back with the help of an unborn soul. Pixar's most philosophical film tackles the big question of what makes life worth living.

title: Coco
plot: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather. A visually dazzling celebration of Mexican culture and the importance of remembrance.

title: Toy Story
plot: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's room. The world's first feature-length computer-animated film forever changed what was possible in cinema.

title: The Incredibles
plot: A family of undercover superheroes, while trying to live the quiet suburban life, are forced into action to save the world. Brad Bird's film is simultaneously a superhero action film, a family comedy, and a meditation on mediocrity.

title: Ratatouille
plot: A rat who can cook makes an unlikely alliance with a young kitchen worker at a famous Paris restaurant. Brad Bird's love letter to cuisine and creativity is Pixar's most purely delightful film.

title: Mulan
plot: To save her father from death in the army, a young woman secretly enlists, taking his place. An unconventional Disney heroine who proves her worth through courage and intelligence rather than romance.

title: Beauty and the Beast
plot: A young woman falls in love with the beast who kidnapped her, while the beast yearns for love to break the curse that has transformed him. Disney's animated masterpiece was the first animated film nominated for Best Picture.

title: The Little Mermaid
plot: A mermaid princess makes a reckless bargain with an unscrupulous sea-witch in order to meet a human prince on land. The film that relaunched the Disney Renaissance with its Broadway-style musical numbers.

title: Aladdin
plot: A street urchin tries to impress a princess by pretending to be a wealthy prince, with the help of a hilarious genie. Robin Williams' voice performance as the Genie remains one of the great comedic performances in any medium.

title: Frozen
plot: When the newly crowned Queen Elsa accidentally uses her power to turn things into ice to curse her home in infinite winter, her sister Anna teams up with a mountain man, his playful reindeer, and a snowman to change the weather. A global phenomenon.

title: Moana
plot: In Ancient Polynesia, when a terrible curse incited by the Demigod Maui reaches an impetuous chief's daughter's island, she answers the ocean's call to seek out the Demigod to set things right. A gorgeous celebration of Polynesian culture.

title: Kiki's Delivery Service
plot: A young witch uses her flying ability to earn a living in a new town, while dealing with the challenges of independence. Miyazaki's gentle coming-of-age fantasy is one of Studio Ghibli's most purely charming films.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
plot: After discovering a mysterious artifact buried beneath the Lunar surface, mankind sets off on a quest to find its origins with help from intelligent supercomputer H.A.L. 9000. Kubrick's epochal film redefined what science fiction cinema could be.

title: Blade Runner 2049
plot: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years. Denis Villeneuve's visually stunning sequel surpasses most expectations.

title: The Fifth Element
plot: In the colorful future, a cab driver unwillingly becomes the central figure in the search for a legendary cosmic weapon to keep Evil and Mr. Zorg at bay. Luc Besson's wildly inventive sci-fi opera.

title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
plot: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight, a cocky pilot, a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the Empire's world-destroying battle station. The film that changed popular cinema forever.

title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
plot: After the Rebels are overpowered by the Empire on the ice planet Hoth, Luke Skywalker begins Jedi training with Yoda, while his friends are pursued by Darth Vader. Widely considered the greatest sequel ever made.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
plot: A troubled child summons the courage to help a friendly alien escape Earth and return to his home planet. Spielberg's most emotionally transparent film remains one of cinema's great tearjerkers.

title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
plot: Roy Neary, an everyday Indiana electric lineman, finds his quiet life disrupted when he has an encounter with a UFO. Spielberg's optimistic first contact story stands in contrast to most alien invasion narratives.

title: Jurassic Park
plot: A pragmatic paleontologist visiting an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure causes the park's cloned dinosaurs to run loose. Spielberg delivered a new benchmark in visual effects.

title: Contact
plot: Dr. Ellie Arroway, after years of searching, finds conclusive radio proof of intelligent aliens, who send plans for a mysterious machine. Robert Zemeckis' patient, philosophical sci-fi rewards viewers who prefer ideas to spectacle.

title: Gattaca
plot: A genetically inferior man assumes the identity of a superior one in order to pursue his lifelong dream of space travel. Ethan Hawke stars in one of the most elegant and underrated science fiction films ever made.

title: The Thing
plot: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims. John Carpenter's paranoid masterpiece is one of the great ensemble horror films.

title: Alien
plot: After a space merchant vessel perceives an unknown transmission as a distress call, its landing on the source moon finds one of the crew attacked by a mysterious lifeform, and they soon realize that its life cycle has merely begun. Ridley Scott's masterpiece.

title: Predator
plot: A team of commandos on a mission in a Central American jungle find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior. A stripped-down, brilliantly paced action-horror hybrid.

title: RoboCop
plot: In a dystopic and crime-ridden Detroit, a terminally wounded cop returns to the force as a powerful cyborg haunted by submerged memories. Paul Verhoeven's satire is disguised as a violent action film.

title: Total Recall
plot: When a man goes in to have memories of a holiday implanted, he finds himself on the run from operatives of the very company who run the memory clinic. Verhoeven delivers Schwarzenegger's most interesting film.

title: The Sixth Sense
plot: A boy who communicates with spirits seeks the help of a disheartened child psychologist. M. Night Shyamalan's film contains one of cinema's most famous twists, executed with remarkable skill.

title: Signs
plot: A family living on a farm finds mysterious crop circles in their fields which suggests something more frightening to come. M. Night Shyamalan mines genuine terror from glimpses and shadows rather than full reveals.

title: Unbreakable
plot: A man learns something extraordinary about himself after a devastating accident. M. Night Shyamalan's quiet, methodical deconstruction of the superhero origin story anticipated the genre's peak by two decades.

title: Split
plot: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 24 distinct personalities and must try to escape before the apparent emergence of a frightful new 21st personality. James McAvoy delivers a showstopping multi-character performance.

title: Princess Mononoke
plot: On a journey to find the cure for a Tatarigami's curse, Ashitaka finds himself in the middle of a war between the forest gods and Tatara, a mining colony. Miyazaki's epic is a masterpiece of environmental storytelling.

title: My Neighbor Totoro
plot: When two girls move to the country to be near their ailing mother, they have adventures with the wondrous forest spirits who live nearby. Miyazaki's most purely joyful film is also his most beloved.

title: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
plot: In the post-apocalyptic future, Nausicaä, a young princess of the Valley of the Wind, struggles to prevent two warring nations from destroying themselves and their dying planet. Miyazaki's first and foundational masterpiece.

title: Castle in the Sky
plot: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and government agents to find a legendary floating castle. A pure adventure story told with irresistible energy and imagination.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
plot: When an unconfident young woman is cursed with an old body by a spiteful witch, her only chance of breaking the spell lies with a self-indulgent yet insecure young wizard and his companions. A meditation on war and self-acceptance.

title: Ghost in the Shell
plot: In the near future, a cyborg policewoman and her partner hunt a mysterious and powerful hacker called the Puppet Master. The foundational text of cyberpunk anime explores questions of consciousness and identity.

title: Akira
plot: A secret military project endangers Neo-Tokyo when it turns a biker gang member into a rampaging psychic psychopath who can only be stopped by a group of psionic children. The film that introduced anime to Western audiences.

title: Perfect Blue
plot: A pop singer gives up her career to become an actress, but she is stalked by an obsessed fan and what seems to be a ghost of her past. Satoshi Kon's debut feature is a dazzling, disturbing psychological thriller.

title: Grave of the Fireflies
plot: A young boy and his little sister struggle to survive in Japan during World War II. Studio Ghibli's most devastating film is a pacifist masterpiece that ranks among the saddest films ever made.

title: Wolf Children
plot: A young woman falls in love with a wolf man, and after his death, she raises their two wolf children in rural Japan. A deeply moving examination of motherhood, identity, and the pain of growing up.

title: Your Name
plot: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way. When a connection forms, will distance be the only thing to keep them apart? Makoto Shinkai's globally beloved film is the highest-grossing anime film of all time.

title: The Shining
plot: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence, while his psychic son sees horrific forebodings from the past and future. Kubrick's horror masterpiece.

title: It
plot: In the summer of 1989, a group of bullied kids band together to destroy a shape-shifting monster that has been terrorizing their small town. Bill Skarsgård's Pennywise is a genuinely terrifying creation.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
plot: Teenagers in a small town are being killed in their dreams by a horribly disfigured man in a striped sweater and razor-fingered glove. Wes Craven's monster Freddy Krueger became one of horror's great icons.

title: Halloween
plot: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield to kill again. John Carpenter's film essentially created the slasher genre.

title: The Exorcist
plot: When a teenage girl is possessed by a mysterious entity, her mother seeks the help of two priests to save her daughter. William Friedkin's film is widely considered the scariest movie ever made.

title: Hereditary
plot: After the family matriarch passes away, a grieving family is haunted by disturbing secrets and an unsettling presence that emerges from their ancestry. Ari Aster's debut is one of the most relentlessly terrifying horror films in years.

title: Midsommar
plot: A couple travels to Sweden to visit a rural hometown's fabled midsummer festival. What begins as an idyllic retreat quickly devolves into an increasingly violent and bizarre competition. A horror film drenched in sunlight.

title: Us
plot: A family's serene beach vacation turns to chaos when their doppelgängers appear and begin to terrorize them. Jordan Peele's follow-up to Get Out operates on multiple levels of social allegory and pure fright.

title: The Witch
plot: A Puritan family living on the edge of a New England wilderness in the 17th century begins to fall apart due to a mysterious evil. Robert Eggers' debut is a period horror of extraordinary atmosphere and dread.

title: Arrival
plot: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world. Denis Villeneuve's cerebral sci-fi is built on a devastating emotional twist.

title: Ex Machina
plot: A young programmer is selected to participate in a ground-breaking experiment in synthetic intelligence by evaluating the human qualities of a highly advanced humanoid A.I. A stunning debut feature about consciousness and manipulation.

title: Black Mirror: Bandersnatch
plot: In 1984, a young programmer begins to question reality as he adapts a dark fantasy novel into a video game and soon finds himself in a bizarre journey. Netflix's interactive Black Mirror film experiments with the nature of choice.

title: The Platform
plot: A man wakes up in a vertical prison where food descends on a platform, with those above eating their fill and those below starving. A brutal Spanish sci-fi allegory about inequality and human nature.

title: Bong Joon-ho: Okja
plot: A young girl risks everything to prevent a powerful multinational company from kidnapping her beloved pig. Bong Joon-ho's Netflix film tackles factory farming and corporate greed through the lens of a children's adventure.

title: The Shape of Water
plot: At a top secret research facility in the 1960s, a lonely janitor forms a unique relationship with an amphibious creature that is being held in captivity. Guillermo del Toro's fairy tale for adults won four Academy Awards.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
plot: In the Falangist Spain of 1944, the bookish young stepdaughter of a sadistic army officer escapes into an eerie but captivating fantasy world. Del Toro's dark fairy tale is simultaneously beautiful and heartbreaking.

title: Crimson Peak
plot: In the aftermath of a family tragedy, an aspiring author is torn between love for her childhood friend and the temptation of a mysterious stranger. Del Toro's most purely romantic film is a lush Gothic ghost story.

title: The Lighthouse
plot: A supernatural tale of two lighthouse keepers on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s. Robert Eggers' hallucinatory film is an astonishing feat of atmosphere and performance from Pattinson and Dafoe.

title: Room
plot: After five-year-old Jack and his mother escape from the enclosed environment where they have lived for his entire life, the boy must learn to live in the wider world. An intimate film about trauma, love, and resilience.

title: Brooklyn
plot: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she quickly falls into a romance with a local. When her past catches up with her, however, she must choose between two countries and the lives that exist within. Saoirse Ronan is luminous.

title: Manchester by the Sea
plot: A depressed uncle is asked to take care of his teenage nephew after the boy's father dies. Kenneth Lonergan's film about grief and inability to forgive oneself is one of the most quietly devastating American films of the decade.

title: Moonlight
plot: A young African-American man grapples with his identity and sexuality while experiencing the everyday struggles of childhood, adolescence, and burgeoning adulthood. Barry Jenkins' film won the Best Picture Oscar in unforgettable circumstances.

title: Lady Bird
plot: A headstrong teenager navigates the ups and downs of being a senior in high school during the 2002-2003 school year, clashing with her overly critical mother and dreaming of escaping Sacramento for New York. Greta Gerwig's debut.

title: Little Women
plot: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters — four young women each determined to live life on their own terms. Greta Gerwig's adaptation is a joyful, feminist reinvention.

title: Marriage Story
plot: A stage director and his actress wife struggle through a coast-to-coast divorce that pushes them to their personal extremes. Noah Baumbach's film is devastating and funny in equal measure, anchored by two great performances.

title: The Irishman
plot: A mob hitman recalls his possible involvement with the slaying of Jimmy Hoffa. Scorsese's three-and-a-half-hour Netflix epic is a meditation on loyalty, violence, and old age, featuring career-best work from De Niro and Pesci.

title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
plot: A faded television actor and his stunt double strive to achieve fame and success in the film industry during the final years of Hollywood's Golden Age in 1969 Los Angeles. Tarantino's most nostalgic and sun-drenched film.

title: Knives Out
plot: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric, combative family. Rian Johnson's ingeniously constructed whodunnit pulls the rug out from under the audience halfway through, then does it again.

title: The Favourite
plot: In early 18th century England, a frail Queen Anne occupies the throne and her close friend Lady Sarah Churchill governs the country in her stead. Yorgos Lanthimos delivers a savage comedy about power and manipulation.

title: Shoplifters
plot: A family of small-time crooks take in a child they find outside in the cold. As the bonds between them deepen, their secrets begin to emerge. Koreeda's Palme d'Or winner is a heartbreaking exploration of chosen family.

title: Burning
plot: Lee Jong-su is a part-time worker who bumps into Hae-mi, a girl who used to live in his neighborhood. She asks him to look after her cat while she travels to Africa. When she returns with Ben, Jong-su begins to suspect the worst. A hypnotic mystery.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
plot: On an isolated island in Brittany at the end of the eighteenth century, a female painter is obliged to paint a wedding portrait of a young woman. A hauntingly beautiful film about desire and the male gaze.

title: Capernaum
plot: A 12-year-old Lebanese boy sues his parents for neglect and reflects on his experiences of poverty and loss. Nadine Labaki's devastating film features a stunning performance from its non-professional lead.

title: A Separation
plot: A married couple are faced with a difficult decision — to improve the life of their child by moving to another country or to stay in Iran and look after a deteriorating parent. Asghar Farhadi's morally complex masterpiece.

title: The White Ribbon
plot: Strange events happen in a small Protestant village in northern Germany just before World War I, as the local children appear to be connected. Michael Haneke's black-and-white investigation of the origins of fascism.

title: Blue Is the Warmest Colour
plot: Adèle's life is changed when she meets Emma, a young woman with blue hair, who will allow her to discover desire and to assert herself as a woman and as an adult. A rawly honest portrait of first love.

title: Before Sunrise
plot: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe and agree to spend one evening together in Vienna knowing they will probably never see each other again. Richard Linklater's film captures the electric feeling of falling in love in real time.

title: Before Sunset
plot: Nine years after Jesse and Celine first met, they encounter each other again on the last leg of Jesse's book tour before his flight home. Almost entirely set in real time, the film feels like stolen time recovered.

title: Boyhood
plot: The life of Mason, from early childhood to his arrival at college, is presented as a single seamless narrative. Richard Linklater filmed the same cast over 12 years in a one-of-a-kind experiment in naturalistic cinema.

title: The Tree of Life
plot: The film follows the life journey of the eldest son, Jack, through the 1950s childhood of his family in Waco, Texas and into a modern day Texas sky. Terrence Malick's most personal and formally radical work.

title: Midnight in Paris
plot: While on a trip to Paris with his fiancée's family, a nostalgic screenwriter finds himself mysteriously going back to the 1920s every day at midnight. Woody Allen's most popular film in decades.

title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
plot: When his job along with that of his co-worker are threatened, Walter takes action in the real world embarking on a global journey that turns into an adventure. Ben Stiller's gorgeous celebration of wanderlust.

title: Into the Wild
plot: After graduating from Emory University, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire savings account to charity and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness. An American idealist tragedy.

title: 127 Hours
plot: An adventurous mountain climber becomes trapped under a boulder while canyoneering alone near Moab, Utah and resorts to desperate measures in order to survive. Danny Boyle brings explosive energy to a story of impossible survival.

title: Wild
plot: A woman, after the death of her mother, and the subsequent disintegration of her marriage and personal life, regroups by hiking more than a thousand miles on the Pacific Crest Trail alone. Reese Witherspoon is raw and revelatory.

title: The Revenant
plot: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s fights for survival after being mauled by a bear. Leonardo DiCaprio won his long-awaited Oscar for a physically demanding, almost wordless performance.

title: Everest
plot: The story of the 1996 Mount Everest disaster where eight people lost their lives in a ferocious storm. A visually spectacular but emotionally gripping account of human ambition and its cost.

title: The Walk
plot: The story of Philippe Petit's daring, but illegal, high-wire walk between the Twin Towers on August 7, 1974. Robert Zemeckis' film makes the heart stop even when you know the outcome.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
plot: The story of the legendary British rock band Queen and lead singer Freddie Mercury, leading up to their famous performance at the Live Aid concert.

title: Rocketman
plot: A musical fantasy about the fantastical human story of Elton John's breakthrough years. Taron Egerton commits fully to the role, delivering both the songs and the man's volcanic emotional life.

title: Straight Outta Compton
plot: The group NWA emerges from the mean streets of Compton in Los Angeles, California, in the mid-1980s and revolutionizes pop culture with their music and tales about life in the hood. An energetic celebration of hip-hop's origins.

title: 8 Mile
plot: A young rapper, struggling with every aspect of his life, wants to make it big but his friends and foes make this odyssey of rap harder than it may seem. Eminem's surprisingly effective acting debut.

title: Hustle and Flow
plot: With help from his friends, a Memphis pimp in a mid-life crisis attempts to fulfill his dream of becoming a successful hip-hop artist. A gritty, sympathetic portrait of creative ambition in desperate circumstances.

title: Almost Famous
plot: A high-school boy in the early 1970s is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies them on their concert tour. Cameron Crowe's most personal film.

title: School of Rock
plot: After being kicked out of his rock band, Dewey Finn becomes a substitute teacher of an uptight elementary private school, only to try and turn his class into a rock band. Jack Black's most beloved and purely fun performance.

title: The Blues Brothers
plot: Jake Blues, just out from prison, puts together his old band to save the Catholic home where he and his brother Elwood were raised. A spectacular and hilarious celebration of blues and soul music that invented the modern movie musical.

title: O Brother Where Art Thou
plot: In the deep south during the 1930s, three escaped convicts search for hidden treasure while a relentless lawman pursues them. The Coen Brothers' loose adaptation of the Odyssey is packed with brilliant music and comic invention.

title: Fargo
plot: Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson. Frances McDormand won the Oscar in one of the great police procedural films.

title: The Big Lebowski
plot: 'The Dude' Lebowski, mistaken for a millionaire Lebowski, seeks restitution for his ruined rug and enlists his bowling buddies to help get it. The Coen Brothers' most beloved cult comedy.

title: Burn After Reading
plot: A disk containing memoirs of a CIA analyst falls into the hands of two unscrupulous gym employees who attempt to sell it. A darkly comic portrait of Washington D.C. incompetence and self-delusion.

title: Prisoners
plot: When Keller Dover's daughter and her friend go missing, he takes matters into his own hands as the police pursue multiple leads and the pressure mounts. Denis Villeneuve's American debut is a morally devastating thriller.

title: Zodiac
plot: A San Francisco cartoonist becomes an amateur detective obsessed with tracking down the Zodiac killer, a serial murderer who terrified the San Francisco Bay Area, targeting cops and leaving cryptic messages. Fincher at his most methodical.

title: Se7en
plot: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives. David Fincher's film contains one of cinema's most memorable and disturbing final scenes.

title: Gone Girl
plot: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent. David Fincher at his most icily manipulative.

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
plot: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker. Fincher brings his characteristic precision to this Scandinavian thriller.

title: Heat
plot: A group of professional bank robbers start to feel the heat from police when they unknowingly leave a clue at their latest heist. Michael Mann's three-hour crime epic contains the greatest coffee-shop scene in cinema history.

title: Collateral
plot: A cab driver finds himself the hostage of an engaging contract killer as he makes his rounds from hit to hit during one night in Los Angeles. Tom Cruise plays against type with electrifying effect.

title: Nightcrawler
plot: When Louis Bloom, a con man desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story. Jake Gyllenhaal is genuinely frightening.

title: Drive
plot: A mysterious Hollywood stuntman and mechanic moonlights as a getaway driver and finds himself in trouble when he tries to help out his neighbor. Ryan Gosling's most perfectly calibrated performance.

title: Baby Driver
plot: After being coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver finds himself taking part in a heist doomed to fail. Edgar Wright choreographs action to music with virtuosic skill.

title: Whiplash
plot: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are challenged by an abusive instructor.

title: Black Panther
plot: T'Challa, heir to the hidden but advanced kingdom of Wakanda, must step forward to lead his people into a new future and must confront a challenger from his country's past. Ryan Coogler's film is a cultural milestone.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
plot: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities. The most visually innovative animated superhero film ever made.

title: Thor: Ragnarok
plot: Imprisoned on the planet Sakaar, Thor must race against time to return to Asgard and stop Ragnarök, the destruction of his world at the hands of the powerful and ruthless villain Hela. Taika Waititi reinvents Thor as a comedy.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
plot: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe. James Gunn's space opera is the most unexpectedly hilarious film in the Marvel catalogue.

title: Iron Man
plot: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil. Robert Downey Jr.'s performance launched the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
plot: As Steve Rogers struggles to embrace his role in the modern world, he teams up with a fellow Avenger and S.H.I.E.L.D agent, Black Widow, to battle a new threat from history. The Russo Brothers bring political thriller energy to Marvel.

title: Logan
plot: In the near future, a weary Logan cares for an ailing Professor X somewhere on the Mexican border. When a young mutant arrives being pursued by dark forces, Logan must protect the girl and battle the demons from his own past.

title: Deadpool
plot: A wisecracking mercenary gets experimented on and becomes immortal but ugly, and sets out to track down the man who ruined his looks. Ryan Reynolds finally got the Deadpool movie he had spent over a decade trying to make.

title: Doctor Strange
plot: A former neurosurgeon embarks on a journey of healing only to be drawn into the world of the mystic arts. A visually inventive entry into the MCU that explores the multiverse concept.

title: Ant-Man
plot: Armed with a super-suit with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, cat burglar Scott Lang must embrace his inner hero and help his mentor protect the secret behind his spectacular Ant-Man suit from a new generation of towering threats.

title: Wonder Woman
plot: Before she was Wonder Woman she was Diana, princess of the Amazons, trained warrior. When a pilot crashes and tells of conflict in the outside world, Diana leaves home to fight a war to end all wars. Patty Jenkins delivers the definitive DC superhero film.

title: Aquaman
plot: Arthur Curry, the human-born heir to the underwater kingdom of Atlantis, goes on a quest to prevent a war between the worlds of ocean and land. James Wan delivers spectacular underwater action sequences.

title: Shazam!
plot: We all have a superhero inside us, it just takes a bit of magic to bring it out. In Billy Batson's case, by shouting out one word, this streetwise 14-year-old foster kid can turn into the adult superhero Shazam. A charming, family-friendly DC entry.

title: Joker
plot: In Gotham City, mentally troubled comedian Arthur Fleck is disregarded and mistreated by society. He then embarks on a downward spiral of revolution and bloody crime. Joaquin Phoenix's committed performance is extraordinary.

title: The Batman
plot: When the Riddler, a sadistic serial killer, begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption and question his family's involvement. Matt Reeves brings a brooding detective noir to the character.

title: Dune
plot: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control over the galaxy's most valuable asset while its heir becomes troubled by visions of a dark future. Denis Villeneuve's adaptation of Frank Herbert's masterwork is visually staggering.

title: Arrival
plot: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team is put together to investigate, including language expert Louise Banks. A film about language, time, and grief that builds to a shattering conclusion.

title: Tenet
plot: Armed with only one word, Tenet, and fighting for the survival of the entire world, a protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time. Christopher Nolan at his most cryptic.

title: Dunkirk
plot: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Commonwealth and Empire and France are surrounded by the German Army and evacuated during a fierce battle in World War II. Nolan's most formally austere and immersive film.

As a regiment assembles to wage war deep in enemy territory, two soldiers are assigned to race against time and deliver a message that will stop 1,500 men from walking straight into a deadly trap. Deakins' one-take cinematography is astonishing.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
plot: The true story of Desmond T. Doss, the conscientious objector who, at the Battle of Okinawa, won the Medal of Honor for his incredible bravery and regard for his fellow soldiers. Gibson's comeback as director is stunning.

title: Midway
plot: The story of the Battle of Midway, told by the leaders and sailors who fought it. A straightforward celebration of American military heroism in one of the Pacific War's decisive confrontations.

title: The Revenant
plot: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s fights for survival after being mauled by a bear. Iñárritu and Lubezki capture the American wilderness with breathtaking beauty.

title: Roma
plot: A year in the life of a middle-class family's maid in Mexico City in the early 1970s. Alfonso Cuarón's black-and-white masterpiece is a deeply personal meditation on class, gender, and memory. Won three Academy Awards.

title: The Farewell
plot: A Chinese-American woman returns to China under the guise of a fake wedding to stow away her family's bombshell news from her beloved grandma. Lulu Wang's film navigates cultural collision with delicate grace.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
plot: This contemporary romantic comedy, based on a global bestseller, follows native New Yorker Rachel Chu to Singapore to meet her boyfriend's family. A charming, opulent celebration of Asian-American culture and identity.

title: Always Be My Maybe
plot: Childhood friends Sasha and Marcus reconnect after sixteen years when Sasha returns to San Francisco. Ali Wong and Randall Park have irresistible chemistry in this sweet, funny romantic comedy.

title: To All the Boys I've Loved Before
plot: Lara Jean's love life goes from imaginary to out of control when her secret love letters are unexpectedly mailed out. Peter Kavinsky became the internet's favourite fictional boyfriend overnight.

title: Eighth Grade
plot: An introverted thirteen-year-old girl tries to survive the last week of her disastrous middle school career before starting high school. Bo Burnham's directorial debut captures adolescence with painful accuracy.

title: Superbad
plot: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry. A raucously funny celebration of male friendship and teenage anxiety.

title: The Hangover
plot: Three buddies wake up from a bachelor party in Las Vegas, with no memory of the previous night and the bachelor missing. They make their way around the city in order to find their friend before his wedding. A comedy machine that works perfectly.

title: Bridesmaids
plot: Competition between the maid of honor and a bridesmaid, over who is the bride's best friend, threatens to upend the life of an out-of-luck woman. Kristen Wiig's breakthrough is one of the funniest films about female friendship.

title: Crazy
plot: Romance/Comedy
column7: A middle-aged husband's life changes dramatically when his wife asks for a divorce. He seeks to rediscover his manhood with the help of a newfound friend this is particularly good at picking up girls. A warm and surprisingly tender film.

title: About Time
plot: At the age of 21, Tim discovers he can travel in time and change what happens and has happened in his own life. He decides to use this ability to get a girlfriend. Richard Curtis' most emotionally resonant film.

title: Me Before You
plot: A small-town girl is caught between dead-end jobs. A change arrives in the form of a man who enters her life in an unexpected way. Emilia Clarke and Sam Claflin bring genuine chemistry to this weepy romance.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
plot: Two teenage cancer patients begin a life-affirming journey to visit a reclusive author in Amsterdam. A tearjerker that earns its tears through genuine performances and an understanding of how illness transforms young lives.

title: Call Me by Your Name
plot: In 1980s Italy, romance blossoms between a seventeen-year-old student and the older man hired as his father's research assistant. Luca Guadagnino's luminous film captures the particular agony of first love.

title: Brokeback Mountain
plot: The story of a complex romantic and sexual relationship between two cowboys and their lives over the years. Ang Lee's film was a landmark in LGBTQ+ cinema, nominated for eight Academy Awards.

title: Carol
plot: An aspiring photographer develops an intimate relationship with an older woman in 1950s New York. Todd Haynes' film is a masterpiece of visual storytelling, conveying desire through glances and gestures.

title: The Remains of the Day
plot: A butler who sacrificed body and soul to service in the years leading up to World War II realizes too late how misguided his loyalty and his heart truly were. Anthony Hopkins and Emma Thompson create one of cinema's great almost-romances.

title: Atonement
plot: Fledgling writer Briony Tallis irrevocably changes the course of several lives when she accuses her older sister's lover of a crime he did not commit. A devastating examination of guilt, memory, and the limits of fiction.

title: Shakespeare in Love
plot: A young Shakespeare, out of ideas and short of cash, meets his ideal woman and is inspired to write Romeo and Juliet. Joseph Fiennes and Gwyneth Paltrow have sparkling chemistry in this Oscar-winning romantic comedy.

title: Much Ado About Nothing
plot: Benedick and Beatrice, both vocal opponents of love, are tricked by their friends into falling for each other in Shakespeare's most effortlessly funny romantic comedy. Kenneth Branagh's adaptation is a pure delight.

title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
plot: A young Greek woman falls in love with a non-Greek and struggles to get her family to accept him while she goes through a process of self-discovery. A low-budget sleeper hit that became one of the most profitable romantic comedies of all time.

title: The Terminal
plot: An eastern European tourist's homeland is engulfed in a coup while he's in the air, leaving him stranded in JFK airport indefinitely. Tom Hanks and Spielberg create a charming fable about displacement and human kindness.

title: Cast Away
plot: A FedEx executive undergoes a physical and emotional transformation after crash landing on a deserted island. Tom Hanks' silent performance opposite a volleyball named Wilson is one of cinema's great one-man shows.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
plot: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional endeavor. Will Smith gives a performance of quiet, sustained dignity that transcends the film's inspirational formula.

title: Hidden Figures
plot: The story of a team of female African-American mathematicians who served a vital role in NASA during the early years of the U.S. space program. An uplifting celebration of overlooked heroes.

title: The Blind Side
plot: The story of Michael Oher, a homeless and traumatized boy who became an All American football player and first round NFL draft pick with the help of a caring woman and her family. Sandra Bullock won the Oscar for her performance.
